issue_summary: Add encoding specific methods, Javadoc, Reformat to standards
javadoc_before: /** * Get the contents of a String as a byte[]. * @param input the String to convert * @return the requested byte array * @throws IOException In case of an I/O problem * @deprecated This is reundant, use java.lang.String.toByteArray. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Get the contents of a String as a byte[] * using the default character encoding of the platform. *

* This is the same as {@link String#getBytes()}. * * @param input the String to convert * @return the requested byte array * @throws NullPointerException if the input is null * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs * (never happens, but can't remove due to backwards compatibility) */
